General.Name: Luen Thai Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Luen Thai Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and trades in apparels and accessories in the People's Republic of China, the United States, Europe, Japan, Canada, South America, and internationally. It sources, manufactures, and trades in textile and garment products; processes, trades in, imports, exports, and distributes garment products; and manufactures and trades in money pieces. The company also offers technical and management services and provides subcontracting services. In addition, it manufactures and trades in handbags. The company was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong. Luen Thai Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Shangtex (Hong Kong) Limited.
General.Address: Nanyang Plaza, Kwun Tong, Hong Kong

8.Name: Mr. Peter  Leung
